LanguageData.PM_Tap_ExtractDesc: Extracts 25 units of vital fuel from the network as a haulable item.
LanguageData.PM_Tap_NotEnough: Not enough vital fuel in the network (25 required).
LanguageData.PM_Tap_FeedDesc: Designate a downed or bedridden Sweeper for a colonist to transfer vital fuel to from the network.
LanguageData.PM_Tap_NoColonist: No colonist available to transfer the fuel.
LanguageData.PM_Need_Dissolved: {0} has dissolved — their Vital Fuel is depleted.
